# Time Series Analysis

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Simple interrupted time series

_To be added._

## Multiple-time-point interrupted time series

_To be added._

## Multi-group interrupted time series

_To be added._

## Cautions in interrupted time series analysis

_To be added._
